title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Aditya Birla Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Aditya Birla Finance
jsonLd.description:
Aditya Birla Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aditya Birla Finance:
Aditya Birla Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance!
